heroHeadline: Day 41: Israel Kills 254 in Lebanon, Shaking the Trump-Brokered US-Iran Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: Israeli strikes across Lebanon killed at least 254, threatening to unravel the two-week US-Iran truce. Analysts warn Washington must restrain Israel for the ceasefire to survive — but the agreement does not formally bind Israeli operations against Hezbollah.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
